titleStmt.title: SII 15.244: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 244. (B.K. No. 223 of 1926-27.) ABBĪGĒRI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the front wall of the house of Gurāchārya Pañchamukhi.
This is dated Śaka 1301, Siddhārthi, Jyēsṭha śu. 15, Tuesday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1379 A.D., May 31.
It records a gift of land in Avvegēri to Hēmādriyāchārya of Yarigēri by the king. The record is in Nāgari characters, the language being Kannaḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatpaṁcamukhahanumānvijayatē .
svasti śrī nṛpaśāṁ 1301 siddhā¨rthiṁ jyēṁ śuṁThis sign indicates the abbreviated form.
15 maṁ caṁdragraṁ paṁ dali Ānēgoṁdī vīra pra
tāpa harihara mahārāyaru yarigēri hēmādriyā
cā¨ryyariga Avvagēriyalli mahānyagrōdhamāna¨rdri
ṭu māru gōdhi 8 Aḍḍa 1 madhyamāṁguli Ivu 24 hela 13 .
mu 7 Adōdha 2 Ivu 40 hyajji rēśīme Ivu 36 māru kūrige 16
Īpra . bhāmi Aṣṭatēja svāmya Āyasāmya sahita sa¨rvvamānyaika
bhōgyavāgi koṭṭu tāmraśāsanava baradī nāganūru siṁgā
pura hirēguḷa kopagrāma hāga gōlega
li(ḷi)ge māḍiṭṭaddu muṁde vaṁ(baṁ)da prabhugalu(ḷu)
naḍasubēku kulagurudēva śapatha
śilāśāsana . ©
